stories.title: NHL draft tracker: Maple Leafs take McKenna at No....
stories.summary: The draft is Friday and Saturday. Here's a list of every selection, including detailed analysis for the top 32.

stories.title: As expected, Maple Leafs draft McKenna at No. 1
stories.summary: Quickly putting to rest any speculation of a change of heart at the NHL draft Friday night, the Toronto Maple Leafs selected Penn State winger Gavin McKenna, 18, with the first pick after he posted 15 goals and 51 points in 35 games for the Nittany Lions.

stories.title: Parker, Delle Donne: WNBA has to protect players
stories.summary: Candace Parker, Elena Delle Donne and Cheryl Reeve -- who headline this year's Women's Basketball Hall of Fame class -- agreed Friday that the WNBA needs to do a better job protecting its players and cracking down on excessive contact.

stories.title: CFL won't allow Brendan Sorsby to join league
stories.summary: The CFL says quarterback Brendan Sorsby will not be allowed to join any of its teams for the upcoming season.

stories.title: Chambliss pushes back on Kiffin's recruiting take
stories.summary: Ole Miss quarterback Trinidad Chambliss on Friday took issue with first-year LSU coach Lane Kiffin's recent comments that Ole Miss' past embrace of Confederate symbols made recruiting Black players more difficult.
